title: Enchantable Boat
description: This mod will allow you to add new enchantments to existing boats.
body:
![AllowEnchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UXklqTXC/images/59b284cc35f097ba7b824b8af01d2f59dc51d839.jpeg)

**Enchantable Boat** is a mod that allows you to add new enchantments to existing boats. You can increase your movement speed and chest capacity, so you can live a more comfortable boat life.

Compatible with [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)!

English and Japanese are available.



## **💎Enchantments**

There are currently 9 types of enchantments. New enchantments will be implemented in future updates.

**Swift Row lv1~5**

Movement speed on the water is increased by 20% with each level.

Level 5 cannot be granted at the Enchanting Table, so grant it from the Enchanted Book.

**Ground Adaptation lv1~3**

Movement speed on the ground, except for ice blocks, increases by 100% with each level.

Level 3 speed on the ground is equivalent to normal speed on the water.

**Gliding lv1~3**

Falling speed in the air decreases and movementn speed increases by 100% with each level.

Level 3 cannot be granted at the Enchanting Table, so grant it from the Enchanted Book.

**High Capacity lv1~3**

The capacity of the chest increases with each level.

Can only be granted to Boat with Chest.

**Climbing lv1~2**

It will be able to climb blocks, Entity and other obstacles.

Level 2 increases the speed of climbing by 50% compared to level 1.

**Storm Rider lv1~2**

When the weather is Thunderstorm, movement speed increases by 100% with each level.

This effect can be applied anywhere on water, ground, air, and ice.

Stacks with other enchantments that increase movement speed.

Level 2 cannot be granted at the Enchanting Table, so grant it from the Enchanted Book.

**Magick Boost lv1~2**

When holding down the sprint key, movement speed increases by 100% with each level.

However, 3 experience points are consumed at the moment of acceleration, and 1 experience point is consumed every 10 ticks thereafter.

If you don't have enough experience required, you won't be able to receive the effect.

This effect can be applied anywhere on water, ground, air, and ice.

Stacks with other enchantments that increase movement speed.

It cannot be granted at the Enchanting Table, so grant it from the Enchanted Book.

**Floating on Lava lv1**

Can float in the air on lava.

While floating, it is slow but can benefit from Gliding.

**Curese of Decay lv1**

An enchantment with a negative effect that reduces movement speed on water by 60% and has a 10% chance that the boat will sink once every 6 seconds.

Boats with this enchanted effect will look flooded.

There is a probability granted when attempting a low level enchantment.


## Finally

Thank you for reading this far. If you have any problems or requests, please feel free to contact us.

Now, enjoy Enchantable Boat!
